title: Convert/create a new dashborad from an object

posts.author: Chris91 (Christopher Carrwik)
posts.cookedHtml:
Is it possible to move a object within a group into an existing folder and convert it to a new dashboard?

Example:
I have object 1 in group A on dashboard Alfa. I want to move object 1 in to my exiting folder Beta and make object 1 a new dashborad.

Is this possible?
